This Notification shall come into force with effect torn 23rd March, 2012. [F.No.U. 11016/01/2011-PITNDPS] NITA GUPTA, Under Secy. Foot note.вЂ”The Notification GS.R. 207(E), dated 10th March, 2011 was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) on 10th March, 2011. s~ 917 GI/2012 Printed by the Manager, Government of India.Press, Ring Road Mayapuri.
